Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Action Pending Binding, Mandatory, Contractual Arbitration
Off Calendar Aug-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF DURAN & VENABLES MOTION TO STAY ACTION PENDING BINDING, MANDATORY, CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION.
Appearances: Cathleen M. Curl of Manow & Curl (650.871.5955) for plaintiff and moving party; no other appearances.
Ms. Curl presented the court with a proof of service. Upon review, the court granted plaintiff's motion to stay. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
